requirement_topic.en: AHRI Certified Directory — De Facto Market Access Listing
requirement_topic.zh: AHRI认证目录——事实上的市场准入列名
requirement_topic.zht: AHRI認證目錄——事實上的市場准入列名

summary.en: The AHRI Certified directory (www.ahridirectory.org) is the industry-standard public database of heat pump and air conditioning products whose performance ratings have been independently tested and verified to AHRI standards. AHRI Certified listing is technically voluntary, but it is a de facto market access requirement: (1) US utility rebate programmes (including those funded by the Inflation Reduction Act) require AHRI Certified products; (2) ENERGY STAR qualification for heat pumps requires AHRI Certified performance data; (3) major US HVAC distributors (Wesco, Ferguson, Johnstone Supply) and residential builders specify AHRI-listed products; (4) US DOE enforcement of minimum efficiency standards relies on AHRI Certified data as the primary reference. Without AHRI Certified listing, a Chinese ASHP cannot access rebate channels, qualify for ENERGY STAR, or be procured through standard US distribution.
summary.zh: AHRI认证目录（www.ahridirectory.org）是行业标准公开数据库，收录经独立测试和核实符合AHRI标准的热泵及空调产品性能额定值。AHRI认证列名技术上属自愿，但实为市场准入事实要求：（1）美国公用事业返还计划（包括通货膨胀削减法案资助的计划）要求产品已获AHRI认证；（2）热泵的ENERGY STAR资格要求AHRI认证的性能数据；（3）美国主要HVAC分销商（Wesco、Ferguson、Johnstone Supply）及住宅建筑商指定AHRI列名产品；（4）美国DOE对最低能效标准的执法以AHRI认证数据为主要参考。未获AHRI认证列名的中国ASHP，无法进入返还渠道、获得ENERGY STAR资格或通过标准美国分销渠道采购。
summary.zht: AHRI認證目錄（www.ahridirectory.org）是行業標準公開數據庫，收錄經獨立測試和核實符合AHRI標準的熱泵及空調產品性能額定值。AHRI認證列名技術上屬自願，但實為市場准入事實要求：（1）美國公用事業返還計劃（包括通貨膨脹削減法案資助的計劃）要求產品已獲AHRI認證；（2）熱泵的ENERGY STAR資格要求AHRI認證的性能數據；（3）美國主要HVAC分銷商（Wesco、Ferguson、Johnstone Supply）及住宅建築商指定AHRI列名產品；（4）美國DOE對最低能效標準的執法以AHRI認證數據為主要參考。未獲AHRI認證列名的中國ASHP，無法進入返還渠道、獲得ENERGY STAR資格或通過標準美國分銷渠道採購。

standards_or_laws: AHRI Certification Programme — Performance certification for unitary equipment (voluntary; ANSI-accredited)
ANSI/AHRI Standard 210/240-2023 — the underlying test standard for unitary heat pump certification

summary.en: China's domestic voluntary product certification scheme for HVAC equipment is the CQC mark (China Quality Certification Centre), which is separate from the mandatory CCC scheme. AHRI does not operate in China, and there is no mutual recognition between AHRI and CQC for heat pump performance ratings. Chinese manufacturers may also reference China Energy Label (CEL) efficiency grades. None of these Chinese certifications or labels qualify a product for the AHRI Certified directory or satisfy AHRI Certified requirements for US utility rebate or ENERGY STAR purposes.
summary.zh: 中国暖通空调设备的国内自愿产品认证体系为CQC标志（中国质量认证中心），与强制性CCC体系独立。AHRI不在中国运营，AHRI与CQC之间就热泵性能额定值没有相互认可安排。中国制造商也可能参考中国能效标识（CEL）等级。上述任何中国认证或标签均不能使产品列入AHRI认证目录，也不满足美国公用事业返还或ENERGY STAR目的的AHRI认证要求。
summary.zht: 中國暖通空調設備的國內自願產品認證體系為CQC標誌（中國質量認證中心），與強制性CCC體系獨立。AHRI不在中國運營，AHRI與CQC之間就熱泵性能額定值沒有相互認可安排。中國製造商也可能參考中國能效標識（CEL）等級。上述任何中國認證或標籤均不能使產品列入AHRI認證目錄，也不滿足美國公用事業返還或ENERGY STAR目的的AHRI認證要求。

standards_or_laws: CQC mark (China Quality Certification Centre) — voluntary product certification (domestic China only)
China Energy Label (CEL) — mandatory display, administered by NDRC/SAMR

gap.en: Obtaining AHRI Certified listing requires: (1) AHRI 210/240-2023 testing at an AHRI-recognised laboratory; (2) submitting rated performance data for all model numbers in the product family; (3) paying AHRI annual participation fees; (4) agreeing to AHRI surveillance testing (random re-testing of listed products to verify rated values). This is a time and cost gap — typically 3-6 months and USD 5,000-20,000+ depending on product family size. Without AHRI Certified status, the product is effectively locked out of the largest US HVAC distribution channels and all IRA-funded rebate programmes.
gap.zh: 获得AHRI认证列名须：（1）由AHRI认可实验室按AHRI 210/240-2023测试；（2）提交产品系列所有型号的额定性能数据；（3）缴纳AHRI年度参与费；（4）同意AHRI监督测试（随机重新测试列名产品以核实额定值）。这是时间和成本差距——通常需3-6个月，费用为5,000-20,000+美元，具体取决于产品系列规模。未获AHRI认证状态的产品，实际上被排除在美国最大HVAC分销渠道和所有IRA资助返还计划之外。
gap.zht: 獲得AHRI認證列名須：（1）由AHRI認可實驗室按AHRI 210/240-2023測試；（2）提交產品系列所有型號的額定性能數據；（3）繳納AHRI年度參與費；（4）同意AHRI監督測試（隨機重新測試列名產品以核實額定值）。這是時間和成本差距——通常需3-6個月，費用為5,000-20,000+美元，具體取決於產品系列規模。未獲AHRI認證狀態的產品，實際上被排除在美國最大HVAC分銷渠道和所有IRA資助返還計劃之外。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — AHRI Certified listing is not required by federal law, but is a de facto market requirement for utility rebates, ENERGY STAR qualification, and major distributor access
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — CQC mark is voluntary; China Energy Label display is mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AHRI Certified listing is technically voluntary but is a de facto US market access gate for utility rebate eligibility, ENERGY STAR qualification, and access to major distribution channels. Chinese CQC certification does not substitute. Manufacturers must invest in AHRI 210/240-2023 testing and ongoing AHRI surveillance testing to obtain and maintain listing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] AHRI认证列名技术上属自愿，但实为获得公用事业返还资格、ENERGY STAR资格及进入主要分销渠道的事实美国市场准入门槛。中国CQC认证不可替代。制造商须投资AHRI 210/240-2023测试和持续AHRI监督测试，以获取并维持列名状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] AHRI認證列名技術上屬自願，但實為獲得公用事業返還資格、ENERGY STAR資格及進入主要分銷渠道的事實美國市場准入門檻。中國CQC認證不可替代。製造商須投資AHRI 210/240-2023測試和持續AHRI監督測試，以獲取並維持列名狀態。

summary.en: Under 10 CFR 430.62 and 10 CFR 431.36, manufacturers and importers of covered residential and commercial heat pump equipment must submit a certification of compliance with DOE energy conservation standards to the DOE Compliance Certification Management System (CCMS) before the equipment is distributed in commerce. The legal obligation is the DOE certification and applicable federal energy conservation standards; industry standards such as AHRI 210/240 are used only where incorporated into or aligned with the DOE test procedure. US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) may request documentation of DOE certification compliance for imported HVAC equipment. Products entering without valid DOE certification may be detained or subject to civil penalties.
summary.zh: 依据10 CFR 430.62和10 CFR 431.36，住宅和商业热泵设备的制造商和进口商，在设备进入商业流通前，必须向DOE合规认证管理系统（CCMS）提交符合DOE能效标准的合规认证。强制性法律义务是DOE认证和适用的联邦节能标准；AHRI 210/240等行业标准仅在被DOE测试程序纳入或与其一致时作为技术路径使用。美国海关和边境保护局（CBP）可能要求提供进口暖通空调设备的DOE认证合规文件。未持有有效DOE认证的进口产品可能被扣押或面临民事罚款。
summary.zht: 依據10 CFR 430.62和10 CFR 431.36，住宅和商業熱泵設備的製造商和進口商，在設備進入商業流通前，必須向DOE合規認證管理系統（CCMS）提交符合DOE能效標準的合規認證。強制性法律義務是DOE認證和適用的聯邦節能標準；AHRI 210/240等行業標準僅在被DOE測試程序納入或與其一致時作為技術路徑使用。美國海關和邊境保護局（CBP）可能要求提供進口暖通空調設備的DOE認證合規文件。未持有有效DOE認證的進口產品可能被扣押或面臨民事罰款。

standards_or_laws: 10 CFR Part 430.62 — Certification reports: consumer products (DOE CCMS submission requirement)
10 CFR Part 431.36 — Certification and enforcement for commercial and industrial equipment

summary.en: China requires energy efficiency compliance for domestic heat pump products under GB 21455 and the mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) programme, administered by NDRC and SAMR. Manufacturers submit test data to support CEL labelling but there is no equivalent pre-import DOE CCMS submission process in the Chinese system. Chinese CEL compliance documentation does not satisfy DOE CCMS certification requirements. Each Chinese model exported to the US must be individually certified in the CCMS.
summary.zh: 中国要求国内热泵产品依据GB 21455和强制性中国能效标识（CEL）计划符合能效要求，由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）和市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。制造商提交测试数据以支持CEL标贴，但中国体系没有对应的进口前DOE CCMS提交流程。中国CEL合规文件不满足DOE CCMS认证要求。出口美国的每个中国型号须在CCMS单独认证。
summary.zht: 中國要求國內熱泵產品依據GB 21455和強制性中國能效標識（CEL）計劃符合能效要求，由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）和市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。製造商提交測試數據以支持CEL標貼，但中國體系沒有對應的進口前DOE CCMS提交流程。中國CEL合規文件不滿足DOE CCMS認證要求。出口美國的每個中國型號須在CCMS單獨認證。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) programme — Mandatory for heat pumps/AC, administered by NDRC/SAMR
GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners

gap.en: Importers must ensure each covered product model has a valid DOE CCMS certification submission before distribution in US commerce. This requires: (1) testing under the applicable DOE procedure to establish HSPF2/SEER2 values, using AHRI 210/240 only as the relevant industry method where recognised by DOE; (2) creating an account in DOE CCMS; (3) submitting a certification report under 10 CFR 430.62 for each covered consumer product. Without CCMS certification, US Customs may detain the shipment. This is a documentation gap that must be resolved before the first shipment, not at the customs border. The Chinese CEL compliance documentation has no equivalence to DOE CCMS requirements.
gap.zh: 进口商须确保每个涵盖产品型号在进入美国商业流通前已完成有效的DOE CCMS认证提交。这需要：（1）按适用DOE测试程序测试以确立HSPF2/SEER2值，AHRI 210/240仅在DOE认可时作为相关行业方法使用；（2）在DOE CCMS创建账户；（3）依据10 CFR 430.62为每款涵盖消费品提交认证报告。未获CCMS认证，美国海关可能扣押货物。这是文件差距，须在首批货物出运前解决，而非在海关边境。中国CEL合规文件与DOE CCMS要求不等同。
gap.zht: 進口商須確保每個涵蓋產品型號在進入美國商業流通前已完成有效的DOE CCMS認證提交。這需要：（1）按適用DOE測試程序測試以確立HSPF2/SEER2值，AHRI 210/240僅在DOE認可時作為相關行業方法使用；（2）在DOE CCMS創建賬戶；（3）依據10 CFR 430.62為每款涵蓋消費品提交認證報告。未獲CCMS認證，美國海關可能扣押貨物。這是文件差距，須在首批貨物出運前解決，而非在海關邊境。中國CEL合規文件與DOE CCMS要求不等同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOE CCMS certification submission is required under 10 CFR Part 430.62 before distribution in US commerce; CBP enforcement at import
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) display and GB 21455 compliance required for domestic sale; no equivalent pre-import submission process

source.publisher: eCFR / US Department of Energy (DOE) CCMS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DOE CCMS certification submission is a mandatory federal requirement before covered heat pump products are distributed in US commerce. The mandatory obligation comes from DOE regulations, not from AHRI certification itself. Chinese CEL compliance documentation does not satisfy this requirement. Failure to certify may result in CBP detention of shipments. Importers should complete DOE CCMS certification as part of pre-launch market preparation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DOE CCMS认证提交是涵盖热泵产品在美国商业流通前的强制性联邦要求。强制义务来自DOE法规，而非AHRI认证本身。中国CEL合规文件不满足此要求。未认证可能导致CBP扣押货物。进口商应将DOE CCMS认证作为上市前市场准备的组成部分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DOE CCMS認證提交是涵蓋熱泵產品在美國商業流通前的強制性聯邦要求。強制義務來自DOE法規，而非AHRI認證本身。中國CEL合規文件不滿足此要求。未認證可能導致CBP扣押貨物。進口商應將DOE CCMS認證作為上市前市場準備的組成部分。
